    1. LatencyConfig()

Class LatencyConfig

java.lang.Object
io.perl.config.LatencyConfig
Direct Known Subclasses:
PerlConfig
public class LatencyConfig extends Object
Class LatencyConfig. Configuration constants and tunables for latency/percentile reporting used by PerL components. Mutable fields are typically populated from configuration files or command-line flags and control histogram/CSV outputs and memory limits for latency storage.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    boolean
    csv
    Whether CSV output is enabled.
    int
    csvFileSizeGB
    Maximum size (in GB) for generated CSV files.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_MAX_LATENCY
    Default maximum latency expected (in milliseconds).
    static final int
    DEFAULT_MIN_LATENCY
    Default minimum latency expected (in milliseconds).
    static final int
    HDR_SIGNIFICANT_DIGITS
    Number of significant digits used by HDR histograms.
    boolean
    histogram
    Whether histogram output is enabled.
    static final int
    LATENCY_VALUE_SIZE_BYTES
    Size in bytes of a single latency value (64-bit long).
    static final long
    LONG_MAX
    Safety cap for individual latency counters to avoid overflow.
    int
    maxArraySizeMB
    Maximum memory allowed (in MB) for array-based latency storage.
    int
    maxHashMapSizeMB
    Maximum memory allowed (in MB) for HashMap-based latency storage.
    static final String
    PERCENTILE_FORMAT
    Format string used when printing percentile values.
    static final double[]
    PERCENTILES
    Default percentiles to compute and report.
    static final long
    TOTAL_LATENCY_MAX
    Safety cap for total latency accumulators to avoid overflow.
    int
    totalMaxHashMapSizeMB
    Global maximum memory allowed (in MB) for all HashMaps combined.

  • Field Details

    • PERCENTILE_FORMAT

      public static final String PERCENTILE_FORMAT
      Format string used when printing percentile values. PERCENTILE_FORMAT = "0.##".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • LATENCY_VALUE_SIZE_BYTES

      public static final int LATENCY_VALUE_SIZE_BYTES
      Size in bytes of a single latency value (64-bit long). LATENCY_VALUE_SIZE_BYTES = 8.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • LONG_MAX

      public static final long LONG_MAX
      Safety cap for individual latency counters to avoid overflow. LONG_MAX = Long.MAX_VALUE >> 2.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • TOTAL_LATENCY_MAX

      public static final long TOTAL_LATENCY_MAX
      Safety cap for total latency accumulators to avoid overflow. TOTAL_LATENCY_MAX = Long.MAX_VALUE >> 1.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_MAX_LATENCY

      public static final int DEFAULT_MAX_LATENCY
      Default maximum latency expected (in milliseconds). DEFAULT_MAX_LATENCY = Time.MS_PER_MIN * 3.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_MIN_LATENCY

      public static final int DEFAULT_MIN_LATENCY
      Default minimum latency expected (in milliseconds). int DEFAULT_MIN_LATENCY = 0.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PERCENTILES

      public static final double[] PERCENTILES
      Default percentiles to compute and report. PERCENTILES = {10, 25, 50, 75, 95, 99, 99.9, 99.99}.

    • HDR_SIGNIFICANT_DIGITS

      public static final int HDR_SIGNIFICANT_DIGITS
      Number of significant digits used by HDR histograms. int HDR_SIGNIFICANT_DIGITS = 3.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • maxArraySizeMB

      public int maxArraySizeMB
      Maximum memory allowed (in MB) for array-based latency storage. int maxArraySizeMB.

    • maxHashMapSizeMB

      public int maxHashMapSizeMB
      Maximum memory allowed (in MB) for HashMap-based latency storage. int maxHashMapSizeMB.

    • totalMaxHashMapSizeMB

      public int totalMaxHashMapSizeMB
      Global maximum memory allowed (in MB) for all HashMaps combined. int totalMaxHashMapSizeMB.

    • histogram

      public boolean histogram
      Whether histogram output is enabled. boolean histogram.

    • csv

      public boolean csv
      Whether CSV output is enabled. boolean csv.

    • csvFileSizeGB

      public int csvFileSizeGB
      Maximum size (in GB) for generated CSV files. int csvFileSizeGB.
